name: Peanut Butter and Jelly Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Place paper liners in muffin pan.
In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a small bowl, beat egg, milk, and oil until blended; stir into flour mixture just until moistened (batter will be lumpy).
Fill muffin cups 1/3 full with batter. Drop about 1 teaspoon of peanut butter and jelly in the center of each muffin cup. Top each with remaining batter.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden. Best served warm. Can freeze individually and heat gently in toaster oven.
